Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 is on top of box_1.
Postcondition: box_2 is no longer on top of box_1; both end effectors grasp nothing.

Precondition: box_1 left and right sides are accessible; both end effectors grasp nothing.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with both end effectors.
